series_metadata.series_description: Analysis of proposed legislation and its impact on the Secretary of State’s office and the county boards of elections. Can include, but is not limited to, copies of current and pending state or federal legislation or draft legislation, analysis of issues and impact, correspondence, research materials, memoranda, or opinions.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until no longer of use, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of use, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
